summary: A timeless children's storytelling universe where wonder feels natural, kindness has weight, and adventure invites young audiences to look closer at the world around them.
description: Whisperwood is an original storytelling universe created for children aged 4–8. The flagship series is Zulk & Zaya. Stories are told with warmth, clarity, and respect for the imagination of young listeners and early readers. Whisperwood is designed to grow across books, animation, games, educational content, and interactive experiences while honoring a single creative foundation.
coreThemes: every problem has a peaceful solution

worldRules.summary: Animals may speak and participate as full characters in a natural, wonder-filled way.
Young characters may face gentle challenges, but the audience must always trust they will be all right.
Magic is soft, warm, and wondrous — never frightening, violent, or corrupting.
Wonder supports the narrative; it does not replace effort, kindness, or courage.
Tools and devices are approachable and appropriate for young audiences.
